subcategory: Animated landing hero with hand-drawn SVG accents
use_cases: SaaS landing page hero section for product marketing
Portfolio or showcase page with engaging visual entry
Startup landing page with animated call-to-action elements
Product launch pages requiring visual differentiation
ai_summary: A vibrant hero component featuring hand-drawn style SVG arrows, a spinning circular badge with circular text, and motion animations. The design combines neobrutalism aesthetics with lime green (#CCFF00) accents, thick black strokes, and bold shadows for a playful yet professional landing page experience. Includes hover effects on interactive elements and continuous badge rotation animation.
